## Sentinel Conventions
<!-- Auto-generated by sentinel scan on 2026-04-14. Edit freely — sentinel evolve will reconcile. -->

### Tech Stack
Next.js 15.0.2 (App Router) TypeScript application using React 19 RC, styled with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui-style Radix UI primitives. PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM (Supabase-hosted), Stripe for SaaS billing, AWS S3 for file storage, Inngest for background jobs, Resend for transactional email, and custom session-based auth built on Lucia (Oslo/Argon2).

### Architecture
Modular Next.js 15 monolith organised around a feature-first directory structure (src/features/<domain>/), where each domain owns its server actions, data queries, React components, and Zod validation schemas. Multi-tenant via Organization + Membership join table with role/permission flags. Mutations flow through Server Actions returning typed ActionState; background work offloaded to Inngest; file attachments stored in S3 with presigned URL proxy.

### Conventions
- **file_organization**: Feature-first directory structure under src/features/, each with actions/, queries/, components/, schema/
- **naming**: Server actions use verb-noun kebab-case filenames, export single camelCase async function
- **api**: Server actions accept (args, _actionState: ActionState, formData: FormData) signature, return ActionState
- **error_handling**: Try/catch in actions with fromErrorToActionState(); auth/ownership errors short-circuit with toActionState('ERROR', msg)
- **imports**: Absolute imports via @/* alias; enforced by eslint-plugin-simple-import-sort
- **file_organization**: All route paths centralised as typed factory functions in src/paths.ts
- **styling**: Tailwind CSS exclusively; cn() helper (clsx + twMerge) for conditional class merging
- **state_management**: Form state via useActionState + useActionFeedback hook with sonner toasts
- **database**: All DB access through Prisma; service modules imported as namespace (* as service)
- **naming**: PascalCase models, SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE enum values in Prisma schema
- **api**: REST API routes are thin delegates to feature-layer query functions
- **other**: Zod validation schemas co-located in feature schema/ directories

### Key Decisions
- Feature-first vertical slice directory structure — co-locates all domain code for independent feature development
- Custom session-based auth (Oslo/Argon2 via Lucia) — full control over session shape for multi-tenant context
- Server Actions as exclusive mutation API — eliminates API route boilerplate, aligns with React useActionState
- Multi-tenant Organization + Membership join table — supports per-org roles, permissions, and Stripe billing
- Centralised type-safe path factory (src/paths.ts) — single source of truth for all URLs
- Inngest for background jobs — durable, retriable functions without managing queue infrastructure
- Zod schemas co-located with features — single source of truth for validation, shared server + client
- AWS S3 attachments via presigned URL proxy — keeps credentials server-side, enforces auth per download

### Setup
- Install: `npm install`
- Dev: `npm run dev`
- Build: `npm run build`
- Test: `# No test runner configured`
- Lint: `npm run lint`
